name: labinitial
description: A simple, minimal website for web development services with Firebase backend and Tailwind CSS.

scripts.build: tailwindcss -i ./css/input.css -o ./output.css && cp output.css public/ && cp *.html sitemap.xml robots.txt public/ && cp -r blog-images public/ && cp -r public/partner-logos . && cp *.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.gif *.svg public/ 2>/dev/null || true
